title: Era of Create
description: An automation-focused Forge 1.20.1 modpack where the Create mod is the heart of your factory, seamlessly integrated with major tech mods for a unified progression.
body:
Mechanical Era - A Forge 1.20.1 Tech & Automation Modpack
Welcome to the Mechanical Era, a comprehensive and carefully curated Forge 1.20.1 technology modpack designed for engineers, automatons, and creative builders. This pack is built around the philosophy of cohesive progression and meaningful integration, offering a unified sandbox where mods work together, not just side-by-side.

✨ Core Concept & Experience
At its heart, Mechanical Era places the Create mod as the central pillar of your industrial journey. From simple gear assemblies to colossal automated factories, Create’s intuitive mechanics define the early and mid-game. This foundation then seamlessly expands into the realm of high-tech with deeply integrated end-game systems like Applied Energistics 2 for digital logistics and Mekanism for advanced processing, creating a satisfying and continuous progression path.

🛠️ Key Features & Highlights
Centralized Automation: Experience the full potential of Create alongside popular and balanced add-ons like Create: Diesel Generators, Create: Nuclear, and Create: Applied Kinetics.

End-Game Tech & Logistics: Scale your industry with Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) for powerful digital storage and autocrafting, and Mekanism for its iconic 5x ore processing and robust power generation.

Enriched Gameplay & Variety: Explore complementary content with Botania (magic-tech), Farmers Delight (cooking), Quark, and Supplementaries for world-building and exploration.

Performance & Polish: Enjoy a smooth and responsive game with essential optimization mods like Embeddium (Sodium for Forge), ModernFix, FerriteCore, and Dynamic FPS pre-configured.

Quality of Life: Packed with utilities for a better experience, including JEI, Jade, Mouse Tweaks, AppleSkin, TrashSlot, and Carry On.

⚙️ Design Philosophy
This is not merely a collection of mods. Mechanical Era focuses on balance and synergy. Configurations have been adjusted to encourage interesting cross-mod interactions and logical progression, ensuring that each mod feels like a valuable part of a greater whole.

📥 Installation & Requirements
Download: Get the .mrpack file from this page.

Install: Import it directly into launchers that support Modrinth, such as Prism Launcher, ATLauncher, or the Modrinth App. The launcher will handle everything automatically.

Allocate RAM: For a stable experience, a minimum of 6GB of RAM allocated to Minecraft is strongly recommended in your launcher settings.

Version: Built for Minecraft 1.20.1 and Forge 47.4.16.

🚀 Start Your Journey
Dive in and start crafting your age of industry! We encourage you to share your ingenious factories and creations. For bug reports, feedback, or to see the changelog, please check the “Versions” tab or the project’s source links.
